questionText: How many community cards are dealt on the Flop?
explanation: The Flop reveals 3 cards at once. It's the biggest reveal in the game.

questionText: What is the very last card called?
explanation: The River is the end of the line. No more cards coming.

questionText: When do you receive your hole cards?
explanation: Preflop (Before the Flop) is when you get your two secret cards.

questionText: Which street comes immediately after the Flop?
explanation: Preflop -> Flop -> Turn -> River. Memorize this rhythm.

questionText: Can you bet on every street?
explanation: Yes. There are 4 rounds of betting. 4 chances to pressure your opponent.
